title: ophrys nephrophylla
intro: Ophrys nephrophylla, also known as the Kidney Orchid, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the orchid family. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include being a diuretic and having anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Ophrys nephrophylla include aiding in the treatment of kidney stones, urinary tract infections, and other related issues. In herbal preparations, Ophrys nephrophylla is often used in teas, tinctures, or infusions, and can be combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
